name: 犧牲式深情告白
description: Ryan為了和Andrea在一起，將名下所有股份交給父親Nate換取其與Lillian分手。用實際犧牲（巨額財產）證明愛情的份量，遠超普通的口頭告白，讓觀眾深受震撼和感動。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Name your terms. How can you break up with Lillian? / I want the ones you hold. / I transferred the shares to him. He's so down to gain control of Wolf from Capital, right? So, I gave it to him. / Mom, I finally made a deal with Nate in exchange for the opportunity to start over with Andrea.
